body: We found that in neutral conditions `Inf * sign(0) = NaN` so that `ΔDSEᵥ` needs to be protected from zeros. We added s some zero protection to buoyancy flux and buoyancy star as well
title: add non_zero protection for LMO and bfluxes

body:
# PULL REQUEST
Minor release following NaN protection for buoyancy flux functions and Monin-Obukhov length in neutral conditions.
title: Bump minor version 0.4.4 -> 0.4.5
